title: Exam Catalog
description: Schema for exams/catalog.json — the top-level index of platforms, domain groups, and certifications.

platforms.description: Supported cloud/vendor platforms. Each certification belongs to exactly one platform.

domainGroups.description: High-level subject area taxonomy. Every domain ID used in any exam file must appear in exactly one group here. Groups are shown in the Quick Test subject-area filter UI.

Platform.description: A vendor platform that offers certifications.

id.description: Kebab-case platform ID. Used as the platform field in certifications.

color.description: Brand hex color shown on platform pills in the UI.

logo.description: Short 2-3 character logo text shown in the badge.

DomainGroup.description: A high-level subject category grouping related exam domain IDs. Shown in the Quick Test subject-area filter as a single selectable item. To add a new domain ID to the taxonomy: add it to the most relevant group's domains array here. Only create a new DomainGroup if the domain genuinely does not fit any existing group.

name.description: Human-readable group name shown in the UI.

icon.description: Single emoji used as the group icon in the UI.

color.description: Hex color for the group in the UI.

domains.description: All kebab-case domain IDs that belong to this group. A domain ID must appear in exactly one group across the entire catalog.

id.description: Kebab-case cert ID. Matches the directory name under exams/. Example: 'data-engineer-associate'.

platform.description: Must match a platform.id in the platforms array.

shortName.description: Short display name for cards and dropdowns. Max ~30 chars.

badge.description: 2-5 character uppercase code shown in the cert badge. Example: 'DEA', 'DEP', 'SPCA'.

color.description: Brand hex color for this certification's badge. Usually matches the platform color.

description.description: One-sentence description of what the certification validates.

topics.description: High-level topic list shown on the cert card.

syllabus.description: Detailed topic breakdown used when generating questions. Defines the full scope of what may be tested.

exams.description: Relative file paths to exam JSON files. Example: 'exams/data-engineer-associate/exam-01.json'.

retired.description: Set to true if this certification has been retired/deprecated. Retired certs are hidden by default in the UI.

retiredDate.description: ISO 8601 date when the certification was retired. Required if retired=true.

ExamDetails.description: Official exam format details from the certification guide.

questions.description: Number of questions in the official exam.

SyllabusTopic.description: A topic section in the certification syllabus.
